trending_videos.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizil

trending_videos.title: Buffalo Sabres at Boston Bruins
trending_videos.description: Boston and Buffalo continue their best-of-seven series in Game 6 at TD Garden. Boston won Game 5, while Buffalo leads the series 3-2. Jeremy Swayman made 26 saves, including a key pad stop. David Pastrnak scored to stave off the Bruins' elimination.

trending_videos.title: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil - Trailer Reaction
trending_videos.description: My reaction to the first teaser for Zach Creagger's Resident Evil. Let's hope it's good!

trending_videos.title: Tampa Bay Lightning at Montreal Canadiens
trending_videos.description: The Lightning and the Canadiens continue their series in Game 6 at Bell Centre. Montreal leads 3-2 after a Game 5 win. Brendan Gallagher opened the scoring for Montreal while rookie Jakub Dobes stopped 38 of 40 shots in the 3-2 Game 5 victory.

trending_videos.title: Marty, Life Is Short | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
The definitive documentary on beloved comedian Martin Short, using beautiful, intimate, never-before-seen archive.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82128115

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Marty, Life Is Short | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

trending_videos.title: Gutfeld!
trending_videos.description: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

trending_videos.title: Cadillac Championship, Second Round
trending_videos.description: The second round of the PGA Tour signature event continues at Trump National Doral in Miami. The field enjoys a no-cut format, meaning all competitors play the weekend and remain in contention for the staggering $3.6 million first-place check.

trending_videos.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access Cinematic Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands.

Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on May 14th, 2026, at 08:00 PDT / 15:00 UTC. 

✨ Wishlist Subnautica 2 Now ✨

Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1962700/Subnautica_2/
Epic: https://store.epicgames.com/p/subnautica-2-d27f94
Xbox: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/subnautica-2/9PJPCB188SVG

🐟 Join the Community 🐟

Discord: https://discord.gg/subnautica
X: https://twitter.com/Subnautica
TikTok: https://www.tiktok

topics.description: Trailers and reactions for movies and games are performing well. Titles like 'RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)' and 'Zach Cregger's Resident Evil - Trailer Reaction' indicate a strong interest in upcoming releases, likely driven by popular franchises.
topics.recommendation: Capitalize on creating content around anticipated releases or popular franchises. Consider producing both original trailers and reaction videos to engage with diverse audience segments.

topics.recommendation: Develop content strategies around live sports events, including pre-game analyses and post-game highlights. Collaborate with sports influencers to increase reach.

Sports networks maintain a strong presence due to continuous interest in live sports events and sports-related content.
